positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for space_is_vampire_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    is_a(space,vacuum)).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    suck(vampire)).

cnf(u15,negated_conjecture,
    ~is_a(space,vampire)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    ~suck(duster)).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    suck(vacuum)).

cnf(u10,axiom,
    suck(plunger)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define household_appliance(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for space_is_vampire_negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    suck(vacuum)).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    suck(plunger)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~suck(duster)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    suck(vampire)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_a(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define household_appliance(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
